    textproc/py-mkdocs-rss-plugin: New port

    This MkDocs plugin creates RSS 2.0 and JSON Feed 1.1 feeds using the
    creation and modification dates from git log and page metadata (YAML
    frontmatter).

    PR:             280489
    Reported by:    Vedran Miletic
